---
title = "Customization"
---

Customize your *Calepin* website with partials, modules, and themes.

## Partials

Override any built-in template by placing a file in
`_calepin/partials/{engine}/{name}.{ext}`.

## Modules

Add custom modules in `_calepin/modules/{name}/module.toml` and enable them
with the `plugins` field in your config or front matter.

## Themes

Apply a built-in theme or create your own with `calepin info themes`.
